case_title: CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES VS. MAXIMINO MACATAO JR

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES
